1: And hear, O earth, the words of my mouth.
2: And as the showers upon the grass:
3: Ascribe ye greatness unto our God.
4: Just and right is is he.
5: They are They are a perverse and crooked generation.
6: Hath he not made thee, and established thee?
7: Thy elders, and they will tell thee.
8: According to the number of the children of Israel.
9: Jacob is is the lot of his inheritance.
10: He kept him as the apple of his eye.
12: And there was there was no strange god with him.
13: And oil out of the flinty rock;
14: And thou didst drink the pure blood of the grape.
15: And lightly esteemed the Rock of his salvation.
16: With abominations provoked they him to anger.
18: And hast forgotten God that formed thee.
19: Because of the provoking of his sons, and of his daughters.
20: Children in whom is is no faith.
21: I will provoke them to anger with a foolish nation.
22: And set on fire the foundations of the mountains.
23: I will spend mine arrows upon them.
24: With the poison of serpents of the dust.
25: The suckling also also with the man of gray hairs.
26: I would make the remembrance of them to cease from among men:
27: And the LORD LORD hath not done all this.
28: Neither is there any is there any understanding in them.
29: That That they would consider their latter end!
30: And the LORD LORD had shut them up?
31: Even our enemies themselves being being judges.
33: And the cruel venom of asps.
34: And And sealed up among my treasures?
35: And the things that shall come upon them make haste.
36: And there is there is none shut up, or left.
37: Their Their rock in whom they trusted,
39: Neither is there any is there any that can deliver out of my hand.
40: And say, I live for ever.
41: And will reward them that hate me.
42: From the beginning of revenges upon the enemy.
43: And will be merciful unto his land, and and to his people.
44: And Moses came and spake all the words of this song in the ears of the people, he, and Hoshea the son of Nun.
45: And Moses made an end of speaking all these words to all Israel:
46: and he said unto them, Set your hearts unto all the words which I testify among you this day, which ye shall command your children to observe to do, all the words of this law.
47: For it is is not a vain thing for you; because it is is your life: and through this thing ye shall prolong your your days in the land, whither ye go over Jordan to possess it.
48: And the LORD LORD spake unto Moses that selfsame day, saying,
49: Get thee up into this mountain Abarim, unto unto mount Nebo, which is is in the land of Moab, that is is over against Jericho; and behold the land of Canaan, which I give unto the children of Israel for a possession:
50: and die in the mount whither thou goest up, and be gathered unto thy people; as Aaron thy brother died in mount Hor, and was gathered unto his people:
51: because ye trespassed against me among the children of Israel at the waters of Meribah-Kadesh, in the wilderness of Zin; because ye sanctified me not in the midst of the children of Israel.
52: Yet thou shalt see the land before thee thee ; but thou shalt not go thither unto the land which I give the children of Israel.
